{{CargoRelic
|name=Collection List
|class_id=20107
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This list contains detailed records of the museum's collections. It helps visitors locate relics easily and assists curators in organizing and managing exhibits more efficiently.
|fame=14
|art=12
|fth=16
|civ=33
|tech=15
|ss1=Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail ATK +2<br>Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail DEF +2<br>Special Tourists unlocked: 20/20
|ss2=Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail DEF +3<br>Special Tourists unlocked: 20/20
|ss3=Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail ATK +4<br>Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail DEF +4<br>Special Tourists unlocked: 20/20
|ss4=Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail ATK +4<br>Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail DEF +4<br>Special Tourists unlocked: 20/20
|ss7=Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail ATK +4<br>Per Special Tourist unlocked, Snail DEF +4<br>Special Tourists unlocked: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
